test_cases.input_summary: Tracing all publications and public statements of an academic epidemiologist who became a government health advisor during a pandemic
test_cases.notes: Excellent coverage of academic-to-government transition. Correctly identified pre-print servers and government testimony archives. Red flags section was particularly sharp on position shifts.

test_cases.input_summary: Tracing media appearances and op-eds of a former politician who now chairs an industry trade association
test_cases.notes: Strong on the political-to-industry pivot angle. Hansard/parliamentary record searches were correctly specified. Tracking framework was immediately usable.

test_cases.input_summary: Comprehensive publication trace for a corporate lawyer who has published articles in legal journals and provided expert commentary on financial regulation
test_cases.notes: Good coverage of legal databases and bar association records. Search syntax tips were practical. Slightly less adapted to the legal field than the other test cases — some generic source categories.
